data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT d.name AS department_name, COALESCE(SUM(c.credits), 0) AS total_credits
FROM public.departments AS d
LEFT JOIN public.courses AS c ON d.id = c.department_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name ASC;

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

issues: Visualization relies on the query ORDER BY for category ordering but does not set an explicit x.sort in the Vega-Lite spec (consider adding sort if deterministic ordering is required without relying on query order).
Long department names may overlap; you already set labelAngle which helps, but consider increasing chart width or wrapping labels if needed for readability.

GROUP BY d.id, d.name
